description_long: This object is a virtual reality (VR) headset, featuring a large, rectangular front visor with a smooth, black surface and a distinctive turquoise accent stripe running horizontally across the front. The headset is equipped with an adjustable head strap system, including a top strap and two side straps, all made from a flexible, matte material for comfort and secure fit. The rear of the headset has a circular support pad designed to rest against the back of the user's head, providing stability during use. The interior of the visor reveals two large, round lenses positioned for stereoscopic vision, indicating its function as a display device for immersive experiences. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic, with some foam padding and elastic components for comfort. This type of device is commonly used in urban environments for entertainment, training, or educational purposes, often in tech hubs, gaming centers, or at home.
description: A black virtual reality headset with a turquoise accent stripe, adjustable head straps, and visible interior lenses for immersive visual experiences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth black visor with a turquoise stripe and the top head strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the visor, the side strap, and the curvature of the headset.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the interior lenses, head strap system, and the circular rear support pad.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile, turquoise accent, and strap attachment.
